flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Bluefield State University fell 22% between 2021 and 2024 (1.3k → 1.0k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Bluefield State University rose 21% between 2021 and 2024 ($8.8k → $10.6k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Bluefield State University rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 ($16.0k → $18.4k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Bluefield State University fell 10% between 2021 and 2024 (61.2% → 54.8%).
